name: JsonValue

unions.name: JsonValue
unions.comment: Type representing json value according to spec

values.name: decoder
values.comment:
Decoder for JsonValue

    [ ( "str", Json.Encode.string "value" )
    , ( "array", Json.Encode.list
        [ Json.Encode.int 10
        , Json.Encode.float 0.1
        , Json.Encode.bool False
        , Json.Encode.null
        ] )
    ]
        |> object
        |> Json.Decode.decodeValue decoder
        |> Expect.equal
            (Ok <|
                ObjectValue
                    [ ( "str", StringValue "value" )
                    , ( "array", ArrayValue
                        [ NumericValue 10
                        , NumericValue 0.1
                        , BoolValue False
                        , NullValue
                        ] )
                    ]
            )

values.name: deleteIn
values.type: List String -> JsonValue -> Result String JsonValue

values.name: encode
values.comment:
Encoder for JsonValue

    [ ( "str", StringValue "value" )
    , ( "array", ArrayValue
        [ NumericValue 10
        , NumericValue 0.1
        , BoolValue False
        , NullValue
        ] )
    ]
        |> ObjectValue
        |> encode
        |> Expect.equal
            ([ ( "str", Json.Encode.string "value" )
             , ( "array", Json.Encode.list
                [ Json.Encode.int 10
                , Json.Encode.float 0.1
                , Json.Encode.bool False
                , Json.Encode.null
                ] )
             ]
                |> object
            )

values.name: getIn
values.comment:
Get json value at given path

    ObjectValue [ ( "foo", StringValue "bar" ) ]
        |> getIn [ "foo" ]
        |> Expect.equal (Ok <| StringValue "bar")
values.type: List String -> JsonValue -> Result String JsonValue

values.name: setIn
values.comment:
Set json value at given path

    ObjectValue [ ( "foo", NullValue ) ]
        |> setIn [ "foo" ] (StringValue "bar")
        |> Expect.equal
            (Ok (ObjectValue [ ( "foo", StringValue "bar" ) ]))
values.type: List String -> JsonValue -> JsonValue -> Result String JsonValue

values.name: setPropertyName
values.comment:
Rename property in json value

    StringValue "bar"
        |> inObjWithProp "foo"
        |> setPropertyName ( [], 0 ) "bam"
        |> Expect.equal (Ok <| ObjectValue <| [ ( "bam", StringValue "bar" ) ])
values.type: ( List String, Int ) -> String -> JsonValue -> Result String JsonValue
